metadata.description: 8 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: multi-agent build pipeline, documentation, code review, parallel build, QA testing, lint, frontend design, and dashboard.

plugins.name: claudex
plugins.description: 8 harness commands with 25 specialized agent prompts: /harness, /harness-docs, /harness-review, /harness-team, /harness-qa, /harness-lint, /design, /claude-dashboard. Includes Diagnostician agent, Meta-Harness-inspired evidence traces, and pre-commit lint hook.
